# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface EdgeConfigData {
  api_key?: string;
  db_url?: string;
  feature_flags?: {
    enable_new_ui?: boolean;
    enable_beta_features?: boolean;
    enable_analytics?: boolean;
    maintenance_mode?: boolean;
  };
  rate_limit?: number;
  allowed_origins?: string[];
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Required<EdgeConfigData> = {
  api_key: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  db_url: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  feature_flags: {
    enable_new_ui: false,
    enable_beta_features: false,
    enable_analytics: true,
    maintenance_mode: false,
  },
  rate_limit: 100,
  allowed_origins: ['https://example.com'],
};

const SENSITIVE_KEYS = new Set(['api_key', 'db_url']);

function sanitizeConfigForResponse(config: EdgeConfigData): Record<string, unknown> {
  const sanitized: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(config)) {
    if (SENSITIVE_KEYS.has(key) && typeof value === 'string') {
      sanitized[key] = value.substring(0, 4) + '****' + value.substring(value.length - 4);
    } else {
      sanitized[key] = value;
    }
  }
  return sanitized;
}

function validateOrigin(request: Request, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  if (!origin) return true;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

function getCorsHeaders(request: Request, allowedOrigins: string[]): Record<string, string> {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate',
    'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains',
  };
  if (origin && allowedOrigins.includes(origin)) {
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Methods'] = 'GET, OPTIONS';
    headers['Access-Control-Allow-Headers'] = 'Authorization, Content-Type';
    headers['Access-Control-Max-Age'] = '86400';
  }
  return headers;
}

async function loadConfig(): Promise<Required<EdgeConfigData>> {
  const edgeConfigConnectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG not set, using default configuration');
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfigClient = createClient(edgeConfigConnectionString);

    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimit, allowedOrigins] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('api_key').catch(() => undefined),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('db_url').catch(() => undefined),
      edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfigData['feature_flags']>('feature_flags').catch(() => undefined),
      edgeConfigClient.get<number>('rate_limit').catch(() => undefined),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string[]>('allowed_origins').catch(() => undefined),
    ]);

    return {
      api_key: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.api_key,
      db_url: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.db_url,
      feature_flags: {
        ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.feature_flags,
        ...(featureFlags ?? {}),
      },
      rate_limit: rateLimit ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.rate_limit,
      allowed_origins: allowedOrigins ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.allowed_origins,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config, falling back to defaults:', error);
    return { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };
  }
}

function validateApiKey(request: Request, expectedKey: string): boolean {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
  if (!authHeader) return false;

  const parts = authHeader.split(' ');
  if (parts.length !== 2 || parts[0].toLowerCase() !== 'bearer') return false;

  const providedKey = parts[1];
  if (providedKey.length !== expectedKey.length) return false;

  let mismatch = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < providedKey.length; i++) {
    mismatch |= providedKey.charCodeAt(i) ^ expectedKey.charCodeAt(i);
  }
  return mismatch === 0;
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const appConfig = await loadConfig();
  const corsHeaders = getCorsHeaders(request, appConfig.allowed_origins);

  if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: corsHeaders });
  }

  if (request.method !== 'GET') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }),
      { status: 405, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  if (!validateOrigin(request, appConfig.allowed_origins)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Origin not allowed' }),
      { status: 403, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  if (appConfig.feature_flags.maintenance_mode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'maintenance',
        message: 'Service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      { status: 503, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  if (pathname.endsWith('/config')) {
    if (!validateApiKey(request, appConfig.api_key)) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }),
        { status: 401, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    const sanitized = sanitizeConfigForResponse(appConfig);
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        config: sanitized,
        source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge_config' : 'defaults',
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  if (pathname.endsWith('/features')) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        features: appConfig.feature_flags,
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  if (pathname.endsWith('/health')) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        edge_config_connected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        features_enabled: Object.entries(appConfig.feature_flags)
          .filter(([, v]) => v)
          .map(([k]) => k),
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      status: 'ok',
      message: 'Edge Config Function',
      endpoints: {
        '/health': 'Health check and connection status',
        '/features': 'Feature flags (public)',
        '/config': 'Full configuration (requires API key)',
      },
    }),
    { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
  );
}
